title: Braised Lamb Tagine
description: A classic Moroccan dish made with tender lamb and flavorful spices, slow-cooked in a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown lamb pieces in batches, then set aside.
Add remaining 1 tbsp olive oil, then sauté Syrian olives until fragrant.
Add tagine spice blend and cook for 1 min, stirring constantly.
Return browned lamb to the pot, then add 1 cup water.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours, or until lamb is tender.
Season with flaky sea salt to taste.
